description: A new junior SOC analyst is joining the team and needs a Splunk account with restricted, least-privilege access. Create a Splunk role named junior_soc_analyst that inherits only from the user role, has a search jobs quota of 3, and is restricted to the security_logs and web_logs indexes for both allowed and default searches. Create a Splunk user account with the username jsmith, full name Jordan Smith, and password JuniorSOC2024!, assigning it only the junior_soc_analyst role and setting the default app to search. Use the admin credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!.
